items.d: It is just after the ninth one. Number 10.
items.s: The ___ and last piece of cake is for me!

items.d: It is just after the tenth one. Number 11.
items.s: Her birthday is on the ___ of May.

items.d: It is just after the eleventh one. Number 12.
items.s: My birthday is on the ___ of June.

items.d: It is just after the twelfth one. Number 13.
items.s: His birthday is on the ___ of April.

items.d: It is just after the thirteenth one. Number 14.
items.s: The school day is on the ___ of February.

items.d: It is just after the fourteenth one. Number 15.
items.s: Mario's birthday is on the ___ of May.

items.d: It is just after the fifteenth one. Number 16.
items.s: The match is on the ___ of June.

items.d: It is just after the sixteenth one. Number 17.
items.s: The concert is on the ___ of November.

items.d: It is just after the seventeenth one. Number 18.
items.s: His birthday is on the ___ of October.

items.d: It is just after the eighteenth one. Number 19.
items.s: The party is on the ___ of July.

items.d: It is the one at the very beginning. It is number 1.
items.s: Monday is the ___ day of our school week.
items.hintDe: Ganz am Anfang, vor allen anderen.

items.d: It is just after the nineteenth one. Number 20.
items.s: The school holiday begins on the ___ of December.

items.d: It is number 21. It is the one just after number 20.
items.s: The school trip is on the ___ of July.

items.d: It is number 22. It is the one just after number 21.
items.s: Tom's birthday is on the ___ of March.

items.d: It is number 23. It is the one just after number 22.
items.s: The match is on the ___ of January.

items.d: It is number 24. It is the one just after number 23.
items.s: Sue's birthday is on the ___ of December.

items.d: It is number 25. It is the one just after number 24.
items.s: We open our presents on the ___ of December.

items.d: It is just after the first one. Number 2.
items.s: Tuesday is the ___ day of the school week, after Monday.

items.d: It is number 30. It is the last day of many months.
items.s: The last day of April is the ___.
items.hintDe: Die Zahl 30, der letzte Tag vieler Monate.

items.d: It is number 31. It is the very last day of some months.
items.s: The last day of the year is the ___ of December.

items.d: It is just after the second one. Number 3.
items.s: Wednesday is the ___ day of the school week.

items.d: It is just after the third one. Number 4.
items.s: Thursday is the ___ day of the school week.

items.d: It is just after the fourth one. Number 5.
items.s: Friday is the ___ day of the school week.

items.d: It is just after the fifth one. Number 6.
items.s: The ___ piece of cake is for Bill.

items.d: It is just after the sixth one. Number 7.
items.s: The ___ piece of cake is also for Bill.

items.d: It is just after the seventh one. Number 8.
items.s: The ___ piece of cake is for you.

items.d: It is just after the eighth one. Number 9.
items.s: The ___ piece of cake is for Jeremy.

items.d: It stands next to your bed and makes a loud noise to wake you up in the morning.
items.s: My ___ makes a loud noise at seven in the morning.
items.hintDe: Die Uhr am Bett, die dich am Morgen aufweckt.

items.d: It is the month after March, when it often rains and the trees have new leaves.
items.s: It often rains and the trees have new leaves in ___.

items.d: It is a hot month of summer, when many families go away on a long holiday.
items.s: Many families go away on a long holiday in ___.

items.d: It is the room where you wash and clean your teeth.
items.s: I wash and clean my teeth in the ___.

items.d: It is the room with your bed, where you go at night.
items.s: At night I go to my ___, where my bed is.

items.d: It is the special, sweet thing with candles that you have on your big day in the year.
items.s: Mum is making a big ___ with 12 candles for my birthday.
items.hintDe: Den isst du an deinem Geburtstag.

items.d: It is a small thing that gives a tiny light on top of a birthday cake.
items.s: We put 12 ___ on the birthday cake and light them.
items.hintDe: Eine Kerze gibt ein kleines Licht auf der Torte.

items.d: It is the place where you go to watch a new film on a very big screen.
items.s: Let's go to the ___ on Friday and watch the new film.
items.hintDe: Dort schaust du einen Film auf großer Leinwand.

items.d: It is the day and the month, like the 5th of March.
items.s: What is today's ___? It is the 7th of July.
items.hintDe: Der Tag und der Monat, zum Beispiel der 5. März.

items.d: It is the last, cold month of the year, when we put up a tree with lights.
items.s: We put up a tree with many lights in ___, the last month of the year.

items.d: When food is very, very good to eat.
items.s: This chocolate cake is so ___! I want more.

items.d: It is where the family eats dinner at a big table.
items.s: We eat our dinner at the big table in the ___.
items.hintDe: Hier isst die Familie am Tisch.

items.d: It is what you call somebody, when you talk about their food at the table.
items.s: Peter is a messy ___ and has food all over the table.
items.hintDe: So nennst du jemanden danach, wie er isst.

items.d: When something is very, very good, the best it can be.
items.s: Ten out of ten! That is ___ work!
items.hintDe: Wenn etwas wirklich sehr gut ist.

items.d: It is the short, cold month after January, when many children ski in the snow.
items.s: We go skiing on the cold, white snow in ___.
items.hintDe: Der zweite Monat, kurz und kalt.

items.d: When you wait a long time and then at last the thing happens.
items.s: We waited a long time, and ___ the bus came!
items.hintDe: Nach langem Warten ist es so weit.

items.d: It is the place where the car stays at night.
items.s: Dad parks the car in the ___ at night.

items.d: It is the place outside, with grass and flowers, where you can play.
items.s: We play outside on the grass in the ___.

items.d: A happy thing you say when something nice happens to another person.
items.s: You won the match? ___ I am so happy for you!
items.hintDe: Das sagst du, wenn du dich für jemanden freust.

items.d: It is the first small room when you come in, where you put your jacket.
items.s: Please put your jacket here in the ___ when you come in.
items.hintDe: Der Raum gleich hinter der Eingangstür.

items.d: An angry thing you say when a person does a very bad thing to you.
items.s: You had my cake without asking me? ___
items.hintDe: Das sagst du, wenn du sehr zornig bist.

items.d: You ask this to find out somebody's age in years.
items.s: ___ I am 11, and my birthday is in June.
items.hintDe: So fragst du nach dem Alter.

items.d: When you feel bad and have to stay in bed and cannot go to school.
items.s: Bill had too much cake and now he is ___ in bed.
items.hintDe: So fühlst du dich, wenn du im Bett bleiben musst.

items.d: It is the person who asks everybody many things to find the robber.
items.s: The police ___ asked everybody where they were last night.
items.hintDe: Diese Person stellt Fragen, um den Räuber zu finden.

items.d: Today is your special day with a cake, and you are one year older.
items.s: ___ I am 11 today, and we have a big cake!
items.hintDe: Das sagst du an deinem Geburtstag.

items.d: It is the first cold month of the year, when we can play in the snow.
items.s: We can ski in the white snow in ___, the first month of the year.

items.d: It is a hot month of summer, when many children play at the sea.
items.s: It is very hot and we play at the sea in ___.

items.d: It is the first warm month of summer, before the long school holiday.
items.s: The days are long and the school year ends soon in ___.

items.d: It is the room where Mum makes the food and we cook.
items.s: Mum makes our breakfast and we cook in the ___.

items.d: It is the one just before this one, the time before now.
items.s: There was a robbery here ___ night, before today.
items.hintDe: Die Zeit gleich vor jetzt, zum Beispiel gestern Nacht.

items.d: It is a room with many books to read.
items.s: I read my books in the ___.
items.hintDe: Hier stehen viele Bücher zum Lesen.

items.d: It is where the family watches TV in the evening.
items.s: We watch TV with the family in the ___.
items.hintDe: Hier sitzt die Familie und schaut fern.

items.d: It is the cool month when the cold days end and the first new leaves come.
items.s: The first new leaves come on the trees in ___.
items.hintDe: In diesem Monat beginnt der Frühling.

items.d: It is when two groups of children play, and we watch who is best.
items.s: There is a volleyball ___ on Saturday.
items.hintDe: Ein Spiel, bei dem zwei Gruppen gegeneinander spielen.

items.d: It is the month before June, when the garden has many pretty flowers.
items.s: The garden has many beautiful flowers in ___.

items.d: When something is not clean and there is food or things all over the place.
items.s: Peter is a ___ eater and has food all over the table.
items.hintDe: So ist es, wenn alles dreckig und durcheinander ist.

items.d: It is one of the twelve parts of a year, like May or June.
items.s: May is the fifth ___ of the year.
items.hintDe: Eines der zwölf Teile eines Jahres.

items.d: It is the cold, grey month when the days are short and it often rains.
items.s: The days are short and grey in ___, before December.

items.d: It is the cool month when the leaves on the trees go brown and red.
items.s: The brown and red leaves come down from the trees in ___.

items.d: It is one part of a bigger thing, like one part of a cake.
items.s: Can I have a ___ of your birthday cake, please?
items.hintDe: Ein Teil von etwas Größerem, zum Beispiel vom Kuchen.

items.d: When you think something is true, but you do not know it for sure.
items.s: It is very grey outside, so it is ___ going to rain later.
items.hintDe: Wenn du etwas annimmst, aber nicht ganz sicher bist.

items.d: It is a bad person who takes things that are not theirs.
items.s: Jessie wants to find the ___ who took her cake.
items.hintDe: Eine schlechte Person, die Dinge stiehlt.

items.d: It is when a bad person takes things from a place like a shop.
items.s: There was a ___ at the big shop, and all the money was gone.
items.hintDe: Wenn jemand etwas aus einem Haus oder Geschäft raubt.

items.d: It is the month when the hot days end and children go back to school.
items.s: We go back to school after the long holiday in ___.
items.hintDe: In diesem Monat beginnt wieder die Schule.

items.d: You say this when a bad thing nearly happens but in the end does not happen.
items.s: That car was very close to us! ___
items.hintDe: Das sagst du, wenn fast etwas Schlimmes passiert wäre.

items.d: It is the day that was just before today.
items.s: Where were you ___, the day before today?
items.hintDe: Der Tag, der gerade vor heute war.

items.d: You say this back to a person after they say thank you to you.
items.s: Thank you for your help! — ___
items.hintDe: Das antwortest du, wenn sich jemand bei dir bedankt.
